label: PROS: Set Robot Name
command: read -p "What will you call your robot? " robot_name && pros v5 set_variable robotname "$robot_name"

label: PROS: Run Program
command: slot=$(cat $ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT/project.pros | python3 -c "import sys, json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['py/state']['upload_options']['slot'])") && pros v5 run $slot

label: PROS: Capture
command: read -p "Where should the screenshot be saved (give a valid file, not folder path)? " desired_path && pros v5 capture "$desired_path"
